data.body: Fifth remediation: made the singleton focused finder a mandatory first vertical slice and stop gate; set absolute recall>=0.90, false-acceptance<=0.10, coverage=1.00, attribution-error=0.00 floors; require packed non-regression against the pinned singleton result; defined prerequisite_fidelity_report inputs, ParityReport output, formulas, metric keys, and failure behavior; defined pack_prerequisite_bins signature and exact token equation; changed finding identity to length-prefixed structured fields.
